game.rulesDescription: The game will start after pressing the start match button.
game.howToPlay: How to Play: Reflect the ball with your paddle past your opponent's paddle to score a point. Left player uses the W/S keys and right player uses the Up/Down keys to move the paddle up and down.
game.howToWin: How to Win: First to reach the points to win or have the most points when time runs out wins!

profile.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

tournament.description: Please select an even number of participants
tournament.description2: The tournament bracket will be filled with {{n}} AI Opponents
tournament.description2_no_players: The tournament bracket will be filled with AI Opponents
tournament.no_users_desc: There are no other users to challenge. Invite your friends to play!

common.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
common.validation_failed: Please check the form fields for correctness.
common.unexpected: An error occurred while processing your request.

username.max_len: Username must be at most 20 characters
username.symbols: Username may only contain lowercase letters, digits, dots and underscores
username.end_dot: Username must not start or end with a dot or underscore
username.con_sep: Username must not contain consecutive separators

password.min_len: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.upper: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.lower: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.digit: Password must contain at least one digit

display.min_len: Display name must be at most 20 characters

avatar.mime: Invalid file type. Allowed: PNG, JPEG, WebP
avatar.size: File too large. Maximum size is 5MB

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes our policies and procedures regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of your information when you use the Service and informs you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.
privacy.use_data: We use your Personal Data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
privacy.interpretation_text: The words whose initial letters are capitalized have meanings defined under the following conditions. The following definitions have the same meaning whether they appear in singular or plural form.
privacy.def_account: A unique account created for you to access our Service or parts of our Service.
privacy.def_affiliate: An entity that controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with a party.
privacy.def_cookies: Small files placed on your device that store browsing data and preferences.
privacy.def_device: Any device capable of accessing the Service such as a computer or mobile device.
privacy.def_personal_data: Information relating to an identified or identifiable individual.
privacy.def_usage: Data collected automatically during the use of the Service.
privacy.def_you: The individual accessing or using the Service.
privacy.collecting: Collecting and Using Your Personal Data
privacy.personal_desc: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide certain personally identifiable information.
privacy.usage_desc: Usage Data is collected automatically when using the Service and may include IP address, browser type, visited pages, and other diagnostic data.
privacy.cookies_desc: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our Service and store certain information.
privacy.cookies_essential_desc: Essential for providing core website functionality.
privacy.cookies_consent_desc: Identify whether users accepted cookie policies.
privacy.cookies_functional_desc: Remember preferences such as login details or language.
privacy.retention_desc: The Company will retain your Personal Data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.
privacy.retention_accounts: User accounts: up to 24 months after account closure
privacy.security_desc: While we strive to protect your Personal Data using commercially reasonable means, no transmission or storage method is completely secure.
privacy.children_desc: Our Service does not address anyone under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16.
privacy.changes_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using Our Service.
terms.interpretation_text: The words whose initial letters are capitalized have meanings defined under the following conditions.
terms.def_affiliate: An entity that controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with a party.
terms.def_device: Any device capable of accessing the Service such as a computer or mobile device.
terms.def_thirdparty: Services or content provided by third parties that may appear in the Service.
terms.def_you: The individual accessing or using the Service.
terms.ack_text1: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of this Service and the agreement between You and the Company.
terms.ack_text2: By accessing or using the Service You agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.age: You represent that you are over the age of 18. The Company does not permit those under 18 to use the Service.
terms.links_text: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by the Company.
terms.links_disclaimer: The Company assumes no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of third-party websites.
terms.termination_text: We may terminate or suspend Your access immediately, without prior notice, if You breach these Terms.
terms.liability_text: The entire liability of the Company shall be limited to the amount paid through the Service or 100 USD if nothing was purchased.
terms.disclaimer_text: The Service is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind.
terms.law_text: The laws of Austria shall govern these Terms and Your use of the Service.
terms.eu_text: EU consumers benefit from mandatory provisions of the law of their country of residence.
terms.changes_text: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time.
terms.contact_desc: If you have any questions about these Terms, you can contact us:
